title: ICC Profile JSON
description: JSON representation of an ICC color profile as produced and consumed by the IccJSON library (IccJSON/IccLibJSON). The outermost wrapper key is 'IccProfile'.

Signature.description: ICC signature in one of four forms: empty string (zero/unset), 4 printable ASCII characters (e.g. 'RGB ', 'XYZ '), 6 characters where the first 2 are any character followed by 4 hex digits (e.g. 'nc1234'), or 8 hex digits (e.g. '00FF0102').

HexString.description: Even-length lowercase hex string encoding binary data

XYZTriplet.description: CIE XYZ tristimulus values [X, Y, Z]

SpectralRange.description: Spectral wavelength range. Used in the profile header (SpectralRange, BiSpectralRange) and inside MPE spectral elements (wavelengths).

Profile.description: ICC profile object containing a header and a tag list

ProfileID.description: MD5 profile ID as 32 hex chars (omitted if all-zero)

CMMFlags.description: CMM flags decomposed into named bits

VendorFlags.description: Remaining vendor-specific flag bits as 8 hex chars

DeviceAttributes.description: Device attribute flags decomposed into named fields

VendorSpecific.description: Remaining vendor-specific bits as 16 hex chars

TagsArray.description: Ordered list of profile tags. Each element is a single-key object { tagName: tagValue }. Known tags use their ICC name (e.g. 'redMatrixColumnTag'). Private tags use 'PrivateTag_N' with a 'sig' field.

TagEntry.description: Single-key object mapping a tag name to its value

TagValue.description: Tag wrapper containing type data, optional Reserved word, and optional alias pointer

Reserved.description: Tag reserved word (emitted only when non-zero)

sameAs.description: Name of the tag that owns the shared tag object (aliased tags)

TagTypeData.description: Flat tag data object. Contains a 'type' discriminator field set to the ICC tag type name (from g_icTagTypeNameTable), followed by type-specific fields at the same level.

size.description: Number of samples in a sampled-identity curve (when curveType is 'identity' and the curve has 2 or more entries). Omitted for the 0-entry ICC identity.

precision.description: Table encoding: 1 = 8-bit integers (0–255), 2 = 16-bit integers (0–65535). Omitted for floating-point.

table.description: Curve samples (when curveType is 'table'). Integers when precision is present, floats otherwise.

SegmentedCurveObject.description: A segmented curve containing one or more segments covering the real line

CurveSegment.description: One segment of a segmented curve. start/end may be a number or the strings '+infinity'/'-infinity'.

reserved.description: Segment reserved word (FormulaSegment only, omitted when zero)

reserved2.description: Segment reserved2 field (FormulaSegment only, omitted when zero)

XYZArrayTypeContent.description: XYZArrayType — one or more XYZ tristimulus values

NumericArrayTypeContent.description: Numeric array types (uInt8ArrayType, uInt16ArrayType, uInt32ArrayType, uInt64ArrayType, float16/32/64ArrayType, s15Fixed16ArrayType, u16Fixed16ArrayType, sparseMatrixArrayType)

pcsEncoding.description: Encoding used for the 'pcs' arrays. 'Lab': L* (0–100), a*, b* (−128–127). 'XYZ': X, Y, Z floats (0–2 range). '16bit': raw ICC U16 integers. ToJson always writes 'Lab'; ParseJson defaults to 'Lab' when absent.

pcs.description: PCS colorant coordinates. Interpretation depends on pcsEncoding.

DataTypeContent.description: dataType — raw binary or ASCII data

SpectralDataArray.description: Spectral function data with wavelength range and sample values

LocalizedString.description: Language/country code pair with localized text

ProfileDescEntry.description: Per-profile description entry within a profileSequenceDescType

deviceManufacturer.description: Flat tag with 'type' field (textDescriptionType, utf8TextType, etc.)

deviceModel.description: Flat tag with 'type' field (textDescriptionType, utf8TextType, etc.)

MBBCurve.description: A single curve in an MBB LUT tag curve array. Discriminated by 'type'.

size.description: Number of samples for a sampled-identity curve (when curveType is 'identity' and size >= 2).

precision.description: Table encoding: 1 = 8-bit (0–255), 2 = 16-bit (0–65535). Omitted for float curves.

table.description: Integers when precision present, floats otherwise.

CLUTObject.description: Color lookup table data. Data values are integers when precision is 1 (0–255) or 2 (0–65535), or floating-point numbers for float CLUTs (no precision field).

gridPoints.description: Grid point count per input dimension (one entry per input channel)

precision.description: Storage precision: 1 = 8-bit (values 0–255), 2 = 16-bit (values 0–65535). Omitted for floating-point CLUTs.

data.description: Flattened output values in row-major order. Integers when precision is present, floats otherwise.

e.description: Matrix coefficients in row-major order. 9 values = no constants; 12 values = with translation constants.

LutMBBTypeContent.description: lut8Type / lut16Type / lutAtoBType / lutBtoAType — MBB LUT structure

bCurves.description: B-side curves (input or output depending on tag type)

aCurves.description: A-side curves (the other side from B)

MultiProcessElementTypeContent.description: multiProcessElementType — a sequence of MPE processing elements

elements.description: Ordered list of MPE elements. Each item is a flat object with a 'type' discriminator field.

MPEElementEntry.description: Flat MPE element object with 'type' discriminator field. Always contains inputChannels, outputChannels, and type-specific properties at the top level.

MPEBaseContent.description: Common fields present in every MPE element content object

CurveSetElementContent.description: CurveSetElement — one independent processing curve per channel

CurveSetCurve.description: A single curve within a CurveSetElement. Discriminated by 'type'.

desiredSize.description: Desired number of sample points (SampledCalculatorCurve only)

reserved2.description: Reserved2 field (SampledCalculatorCurve only, omitted when zero)

MatrixElementContent.description: MatrixElement — linear transform with optional constants

ExtCLutElementContent.description: ExtCLutElement — extended CLUT with explicit storage type

AcsElementContent.description: BAcsElement / EAcsElement — auxiliary color space conversion bookend

CalculatorElementContent.description: CalculatorElement — programmable calculator with named channels, variables, macros, and sub-elements

imports.description: Files to import variable/macro/element definitions from

subElements.description: Named embedded MPE elements referenced from mainFunction

items.description: Flat object with 'name' (element name), 'type' (MPE element type), plus type-specific fields

name.description: Element name used in mainFunction references

JabElementContent.description: XYZToJabElement / JabToXYZElement — CIECAM02 color appearance model conversion

TintArrayElementContent.description: TintArrayElement — spectral tinting via a tag array

arrayType.description: Tag type name of the embedded array

file.description: External file path (alternative to inline values)

whiteData.description: White spectral data (one value per wavelength step)

offsetData.description: Matrix offset vector (one value per wavelength step)

DictTypeContent.description: dictType — name/value pairs with optional localization

TagStructTypeContent.description: tagStructType — named structure containing member tags

memberTags.description: Each item is a single-key object { elemName: { type, ...fields } }

items.description: Single-key object mapping element name to its flat tag content

StructMemberTagContent.description: Content of a struct member tag. Either a 'sameAs' alias, or a flat tag with 'type' field.

sameAs.description: Name of element that owns the shared tag (aliased members)

arrayTags.description: Each item is a flat object with 'type' discriminator plus type-specific fields

EmbeddedProfileTypeContent.description: embeddedProfileType — contains a nested ICC profile

GamutBoundaryDescTypeContent.description: gamutBoundaryDescType — mesh of PCS (and optional device) vertices with triangle connectivity

PrivateTypeContent.description: PrivateType — unknown tag type stored as raw hex
